tools.name: Say hello
args: Welcome to Pier — drag a file onto a tool, or just click Run
tools.description: A quick test to make sure everything's working.

tools.name: What's this file?

parameters.label: File
parameters.help: Drop any file. Pier will tell you what kind of file it is.

tools.description: Drop any file to see what kind it is.

tools.name: URL headers
tools.description: Fetch HTTP headers for a URL.

tools.name: Convert video

parameters.label: Video file
parameters.help: The video you want to convert.

parameters.label: Output format
parameters.help: Pick the format of the converted file. MP4 works almost everywhere.

parameters.label: Video bitrate
parameters.help: Higher = better quality, larger file. Leave blank for the default.

parameters.label: Show full ffmpeg log
parameters.help: Print every step ffmpeg takes. Useful when something goes wrong.

tools.description: Convert a video to another format.

tools.name: Dub video to Japanese

parameters.label: English video
parameters.help: Drop the video you want dubbed into Japanese.

parameters.label: Voice model
parameters.help: Which AI generates the Japanese voice. The default works well for most videos.

parameters.label: Remove background noise first
parameters.help: Clean up the original audio before dubbing. Slower, but better with noisy footage.

tools.description: Dub an English video to Japanese with cloned voice + burned subs.
